chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 873 of 2020 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 27.09.2023 This petition was filed on 05.09.2020, has not been pursued as required. No one is present today, no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications, if any. Judge Judge ARBROHI
